name: Sketch
tagline: Mac design tool for UI/UX designers
description: Sketch is a macOS-only vector design tool that was the industry standard for UI/UX design before Figma. It pioneered symbols, shared libraries, and artboard-based workflows. Still popular with Mac-focused teams.
cons: Mac only — no Windows or Linux
use_cases: Your entire design team works on Macs and prioritises native app performance over browser-based collaboration
You have an established Sketch plugin workflow for design tokens, icons, or handoff that would be expensive to rebuild in another tool
You want a focused UI design tool at half the price of Figma without paying for features your team doesn't use
You're a solo designer or small Mac-only studio that values shared libraries and symbol reuse over real-time multiplayer editing
